text.title: task-creation-principles Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for task-creation-principles as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Tasks too large — "Implement authentication" as a single task.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Break down until each task fits one work session and <100k tokens.

failure-mode.description: No traceability — FR-X and AD-X not mentioned in task.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Add FR-X and AD-X links inline; executor cannot verify the task satisfies a requirement without them.

failure-mode.description: Vague acceptance criteria — "user experience is smooth".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Replace with Given-When-Then that a test can verify as pass or fail.

failure-mode.description: Missing test files in Files table.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Include testing in AC and list test files explicitly; tests are required, not optional.

failure-mode.description: INVEST "Independent" criterion violated in sequential migration chains.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Accept partial dependency and document it explicitly — forcing artificial independence causes worse splits.
